scripts.dev:web: npm run ip:sync && npm --workspace @facemirror/web run dev
scripts.dev:server: npm run ip:sync && npm --workspace @facemirror/server run dev
scripts.build: npm --workspace @facemirror/shared run build && npm --workspace @facemirror/server run build && npm --workspace @facemirror/web run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace @facemirror/shared run build && npm --workspace @facemirror/server run build && npm --workspace @facemirror/web run build
